slugs.concept: Brass relay stations route customer, finance, and support records to a human approval handoff.
HR folders and finance materials meet at a glass balance for accountable review.
A tactile document sorter automates routine files while a reviewer resolves an exception.
Theatre crews pass project boards, dependencies, resources, and approvals through a fly tower.
A print editor checks a proof against a style sample before a branded text run is released.
Two writers slide a blank revision page across a stage workshop with colored handoff tabs.
A quiet breathing ritual sits beside an open door toward professional support.
A radio-style operator routes a chatbot response and keeps a red escalation cord available.
One boat hull becomes two platform tests in parallel channels joined by a bridge.

visual_inspection.notes: All approved final WebPs were visually inspected; WriterDuet was regenerated once for blank pages, and Workato, WorkFusion, and Writer were regenerated once to remove line-like document marks.
